name: JRZ Transportation Inc
entity_status: bankruptcy filed 2024-06-12 (Case 2:24-bk-21463, PA Western Bankruptcy Court)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record confidently matched to JRZ Transportation Inc in Irwin, PA. USDOT 3039957 (JRZ TRANSPORTATION LLC) is in El Paso, TX - not a match. name: Sullivan Bus Barn Trnsprtn
notes: 1073 E Vine St, Sullivan, MO 63080 is also the address of Sullivan High School (MSHSAA). 'Sullivan Bus Barn' appears to be the in-house transportation/bus garage for the Sullivan School District (R-II), not an independent private carrier. No FMCSA SAFER carrier record under this name and address; school district operations typically run under district USDOT or no public-facing carrier registration. Sullivan Transportation Inc (USDOT 1142210) and R M Sullivan Transportation Inc (USDOT 55348) are unrelated carriers in other locations. Not a viable tuck-in target.

name: Campbell Bus Co Inc
fmcsa_address: 258 Grove City Rd, Slippery Rock, PA 16057
registry_source: PA Bus Association directory; D&B; PA Department of State (BUCO TRANSPORTATION INC d/b/a CAMPBELL BUS LINES)
notes: Operating entity is BUCO TRANSPORTATION INC d/b/a CAMPBELL BUS LINES. PO Box 340 and Slippery Rock, PA 16057 match input record. SAFER snapshot shows Satisfactory rating (April 2024 compliance review), 23 power units, 41 drivers, zero OOS violations in past 24 months, 1 tow-away crash. Company history: started transporting school children to a one-room schoolhouse in 1937; current corporate entity established 1969. Also operates school bus, charter, motorcoach, and tour services. A separate older record CAMPBELL BUS COMPANY INC (USDOT 1791039) shows INACTIVE in SAFER - likely a prior/related filing.

name: Henry School Buses LLC
notes: PA SoS shows Henry School Buses, L.L.C. (Entity # 4199812) at 289 Old River Road, Wilkes Barre, PA 18702; incorporated July 9, 2013; status Active. Industry classified as School Buses, Luzerne County. Insurance report shows ~12 years tenure with same carrier (consistent with 2013 inception). No FMCSA SAFER carrier snapshot confidently matched by name and address; several 'Henry' carriers exist (HENRY'S CARRIER INC 1736855, WILLIAM H HENRY JR 2441623, WILLIAM HENRY 1490822) but none clearly tied to 289 Old River Rd. Company may operate under a different DOT registrant or may be exempt/local intrastate.

name: BMX Bus
notes: NOT a student transportation operator. 'BMX BUS Inc' is a BMX bicycle racing nonprofit based at 4416 Kinswood Ln, Saint Louis, MO 63129, that operated the Sunset Hills BMX track in Sunset Hills/Sappington, MO. Per news reports the track flooded multiple times and Sunset Hills BMX closed and officially terminated its lease. President is Johnny Murdock. Not a viable tuck-in target for student transportation; should be removed from the prospect list.
